programs.title: Living Single
programs.desc: Khadijah fears a night of passion may damage a childhood friendship.

programs.title: Fatal Attraction
programs.desc: A high school graduate disappears while pursuing her dream of joining the military and enjoying life with her new boyfriend; detectives wonder if the pressures of recruitment became too much, until a gruesome discovery changes the investigation.

programs.title: Fatal Attraction
programs.desc: When a man is found in the street with a gunshot wound to the head, police think that his lifestyle has finally caught up to him; but, as they work, detectives uncover a motive and a betrayal from a woman who supposedly loved him.

programs.title: For My Man
programs.desc: When a young woman is released from prison, she is determined to live her life on the straight and narrow; however, her efforts are derailed after she falls hard for a handsome stranger who drags her down into a dark place.

programs.title: For My Man
programs.desc: A young mother gives up a life of security with a wholesome family man to live on the edge with the bad boy she cannot resist.

programs.title: For My Man
programs.desc: When a God-fearing woman falls in love with a handsome ex-convict, he convinces her that his life of crime is behind him; he ropes her into helping him commit a double homicide, and she realizes she's in love with a wolf in sheep's clothing.
